violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the glass washer was observed fluctuating between 200-10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is not to use glass washer until it reaches the proper chlorine sanitizing solution. PIC called for service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, French fries were placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in plastic containers. French fries were uncovered at the time of inspection. Inspector recommended using metal containers instead of plastic. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The spice storage container was observed cracked and in poor repair. Walk-in cooler #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
The ceiling by the 3-bay sink, and bar #3 3-bay faucet was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
The wall in the walk-in cooler #2 area, and floor tiles throughout the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Milk and juice were observed held at 46-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Single service items (cups) were observed stored on the floor in the bar area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of bar cooler was 46 degrees Fahrenheit. See disposal. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Spray hose located at the 3 bay sink area was not in good repair, observed missing handle. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer has an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
